name: input
description: Foundational single-line text input partial. A native <input> inside a styled flex-row container that supports leading/trailing adornment slots, optional clearable button, optional live character-count badge, four semantic states (default/focused/invalid/disabled), three toolbar-aligned sizes (sm/md/lg), and a borderless layout variant for inline-edit surfaces. The native element supplies role=textbox, keyboard, and focus for free; no JS is needed unless showCount or clearable are enabled (input-count.enhancer.ts). Binds via l:model or a plain form name; server-renders the current value into value='' with no client round-trip.
docs: Copies input.jte + input-count.enhancer.ts to your JTE root at lievit/. Reached as @template.lievit.input(...). The native <input> POSTs under name= with zero JS; bind to a wire field with attrs='l:model="field"'. size= (sm/md/lg) is height-based so the input lines up flush with a button or native-select of the same size in a toolbar row. The enhancer (input-count.enhancer.ts) is optional: fields without showCount or clearable need no JS. Call enhanceAllInputs() on DOMContentLoaded and after WIRE morphs.
